creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
At <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-61-kmod/>, for example: 

> This version is for FreeBSD 14-STABLE 1400508 and above.

1400508 in February <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/2d120981e26dfef5c9cb9eb9936bb46cb6918136> preceded 1401000 in May <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/3f5f38755b8f521401283370770bc375fe71a725#diff-8cc2f03d0a63e9cba969a3c3c0b06fb5e4e29b7ab94948ab131126256952ad8aR78> and 14.0-RELEASE is no longer supported <https://www.freebsd.org/security/unsupported/> …

… so, the mention of 1400508 seems superfluous in pkg-descr.
